sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: "I just went in and came out, but I feel different"... That hot place in Seongsu-dong is run by SK Telecom?
feed.summary: SK Telecom's T Factory in Seongsu-dong is a popular pop-up store designed for the MZ generation, offering interactive experiences beyond a typical telecom shop. The current exhibition, "FOR MY NEXT CHAPTER," features AI-powered activities, personalized recommendations, and various zones for health, hobbies, and finance. The initiative aims to create an engaging space that resonates with visitors and showcases dynamic brand experiences, moving beyond simple product displays.

feed.title: Frederick Lowery named new CEO of Henry Schein, effective March 2026
feed.summary: Henry Schein, Inc. (NASDAQ:HSIC) has announced the appointment of Frederick M. Lowery as its new Chief Executive Officer, effective March 2, 2026. Lowery, who brings over two decades of healthcare distribution experience, will succeed Stanley M. Bergman, who will transition to Chairman of the Board after 35 years as CEO. This leadership change is part of a planned transition to ensure operational continuity, with the company trading near its 52-week high and actively repurchasing shares.

feed.title: Boston Scientific to acquire urinary incontinence treatment developer Valencia Technologies
feed.summary: Boston Scientific announced its agreement to acquire Valencia Technologies, a developer of solutions for treating bladder dysfunction, for an undisclosed amount. Valencia's eCoin system, an FDA-approved implantable tibial nerve stimulation (ITNS) device for urge urinary incontinence, will expand Boston Scientific's Urology portfolio. The acquisition is expected to close in the first half of 2026 and will enhance Boston Scientific's offerings for patients with bladder issues.

feed.title: Stryker Corporation $SYK is Loring Wolcott & Coolidge Fiduciary Advisors LLP MA's 6th Largest Position
feed.summary: Loring Wolcott & Coolidge Fiduciary Advisors LLP MA slightly decreased its stake in Stryker (SYK) by 0.7% in Q3, now holding 1,157,924 shares, making it their 6th largest position. Despite significant insider selling totaling $185.4 million, Stryker beat Q3 earnings and revenue estimates and raised its quarterly dividend. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus target price of $430.00.

feed.title: What You Need to Know Ahead of Honeywell International's Earnings Release
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. (HON) is set to release its fiscal Q4 2025 earnings, with analysts expecting a profit of $2.57 per share, a 4.1% increase year-over-year. Despite consistent EPS beats, HON stock has underperformed the S&P 500 and Industrial Select Sector SPDR Fund over the past year due to margin declines. Analysts hold a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price suggesting a 13.3% potential upside.

feed.title: Ditto Joins Zebra Technologies’ PartnerConnect Program
feed.summary: Ditto, a pioneer in edge computing and peer-to-peer data synchronization, has joined Zebra Technologies’ PartnerConnect program as a Premier ISV Partner. This collaboration aims to provide resilient, offline-first solutions for mobile operations in retail, warehouse, and logistics, integrating Ditto's technology with Zebra's hardware to eliminate downtime and ensure continuous critical workflows. Both companies are also cross-participating in each other's partner programs to enhance their offerings.

feed.title: Boston Scientific to acquire Valencia Technologies for urology expansion
feed.summary: Boston Scientific announced its acquisition of Valencia Technologies Corporation, a medical technology company specializing in bladder dysfunction treatments. This strategic move, which involves Valencia's FDA-approved eCoin System for urge urinary incontinence, is expected to expand Boston Scientific's urology portfolio and will be completed in the first half of 2026. The financial terms were not disclosed, and while the acquisition is projected to have an immaterial impact on adjusted earnings per share in 2026, it is expected to be more dilutive on a GAAP basis.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Boosts Stock Position in Amgen Inc. $AMGN
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC increased its stake in Amgen Inc. by 38.4% in Q3, now holding 17,964 shares valued at $5.07 million. While institutional investors are increasing their positions, company insiders have been net sellers, offloading shares worth over $3.67 million in the last 90 days. Amgen reported strong Q3 earnings, beating estimates, and raised its quarterly dividend, leading to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating among analysts.

feed.title: UnitedHealth stock slips on report of Medicare ‘aggressive tactics’ (UNH:NYSE)
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) stock declined in premarket trading following a report from the Wall Street Journal. A Senate committee investigating the company's practices found that the managed care insurer used "aggressive tactics" to collect payment-boosting diagnoses for Medicare.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Has $4.69 Million Stake in S&P Global Inc. $SPGI
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC significantly increased its stake in S&P Global Inc. (NYSE:SPGI) by 183.8% in the third quarter, bringing its total holdings to 9,645 shares valued at $4.694 million. S&P Global maintains strong institutional ownership at 87.17% and has a "Buy" consensus rating from analysts with a target price of $615.14. The company has a market cap of approximately $164.2 billion and a P/E ratio of 39.4, with FY2025 EPS guidance set between $14.80 and $15.05.

feed.title: 17,720 Shares in International Business Machines Corporation $IBM Acquired by Tema Etfs LLC
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC has acquired 17,720 shares of International Business Machines (IBM) valued at approximately $5 million, establishing a new position in the company during the third quarter. IBM recently exceeded earnings expectations, reporting Q3 EPS of $2.65 against an estimate of $2.45, with revenue up 9.1% year-over-year. The company has also seen multiple analyst upgrades and price target increases, driven by strategic moves like the Confluent acquisition and quantum computing milestones.

feed.title: TD Cowen Adjusts Price Target on Global Payments to $90 From $95, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: TD Cowen has revised its price target for Global Payments (GPN) down to $90 from $95, while reiterating a Hold rating on the company's stock. This adjustment reflects a moderated outlook but maintains a neutral stance on the payment solutions provider. The report from MT Newswires was published on January 12, 2026, at 07:11 am EST.

feed.title: Moderna expects $1.9 billion in sales, trims costs forecast for 2025
feed.summary: Moderna anticipates approximately $1.9 billion in sales for 2025, buoyed by higher-than-expected vaccination rates in the retail sector, and has cut its operating expense forecast by $200 million. The company, which saw a significant revenue drop post-pandemic, aims for up to 10% revenue growth in 2026 and expects regulatory approvals for new influenza and COVID-flu combination shots this year, targeting their launch in 2027 to offset declining COVID vaccine income. Moderna will also release important trial data for oncology, rare disease, and infectious disease vaccines in 2026.

feed.title: Henry Schein Appoints Frederick M. Lowery as Chief Executive Officer
feed.summary: Henry Schein, Inc. has announced the appointment of Frederick M. Lowery as its new Chief Executive Officer, effective March 2, 2026. He will succeed Stanley M. Bergman, who will continue as Chairman of the Board. Mr. Lowery brings over two decades of healthcare expertise, most recently from Thermo Fisher Scientific, and is expected to lead the company's next phase of growth and strategic execution.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Makes New Investment in Wells Fargo & Company $WFC
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC has acquired a new stake of 63,522 shares in Wells Fargo & Company, valued at approximately $5.324 million during Q3. The financial services provider exceeded Q3 earnings expectations with an EPS of $1.73 and revenue of $21.44 billion, prompting mixed reactions from analysts with a consensus "Hold" rating but varying price targets and upgrades/downgrades. Institutional investors collectively own about 75.9% of the stock.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Purchases New Stake in Bank of America Corporation $BAC
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC has acquired a new stake of 122,923 shares in Bank of America (NYSE: BAC), valued at approximately $6.34 million, during the third quarter. Bank of America reported strong quarterly earnings, beating estimates with $1.06 EPS and a 10.8% year-over-year revenue increase. The company faces regulatory scrutiny from India's SEBI regarding alleged sharing of confidential information, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price near $59.82.

feed.title: The Truth About Packaging Corp of America: Why This ‘Boring’ Stock Suddenly Isn’t
feed.summary: Packaging Corp of America (PKG) is highlighted as a "boring" but potentially reliable investment in the packaging sector, particularly benefiting from e-commerce growth. Despite not being a viral stock, it offers consistent dividends, stability, and exposure to the real economy, making it an attractive option for long-term, fundamentals-focused investors. The article contrasts its steady performance and sustainable practices with the volatility of trendy, social media-hyped stocks.

feed.title: Loop Capital Remains Bullish on Synopsys Inc. (SNPS) on AI and EDA Tailwinds
feed.summary: Loop Capital analysts maintained a Buy rating on Synopsys Inc. (SNPS) and increased its price target to $600, citing potential benefits from a broad market rally in 2026, growth in automotive and industrial semiconductors, and a strategic partnership with Nvidia. The company is also expected to gain from the Electronic Design Automation (EDA) market due to AI-enhanced tools leading to higher contract values.

feed.title: New study: one Medicare option cut patient costs by 53% in 2025
feed.summary: A new Milliman study commissioned by UnitedHealth Group found that Medicare Advantage (MA) is significantly more cost-effective than traditional Medicare. The study, using 2025 cost estimates, concluded that MA costs the federal government 9% less and reduces out-of-pocket expenses for beneficiaries by 53%. These savings are partly attributed to MA's managed care structure and its ability to provide additional benefits.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Takes $3.69 Million Position in Uber Technologies, Inc. $UBER
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC has acquired a new position of 37,655 shares in Uber Technologies, Inc. valued at approximately $3.69 million during the third quarter. This investment comes as Uber reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with $3.11 EPS and $13.47 billion in revenue. Despite some mixed analyst views and concerns over short-term earnings risks, the overall sentiment remains largely positive with several firms reiterating Buy/Overweight ratings.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Buys Shares of 136,869 AT&T Inc. $T
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC has acquired a new stake in AT&T Inc., purchasing 136,869 shares valued at approximately $3.87 million during the third quarter. AT&T recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2775, with an ex-dividend date of January 12th, resulting in an annualized yield of roughly 4.6%. Analysts currently hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus for AT&T, with an average target price of $29.42, while the shares trade near $24 with a market capitalization of $170.1 billion and a P/E ratio around 7.8.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Purchases 4,989 Shares of Synopsys, Inc. $SNPS
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC significantly increased its stake in Synopsys, Inc. (NASDAQ:SNPS) by 209.1% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 4,989 shares and bringing its total holdings to 7,375 shares valued at $3.64 million. This move aligns with a generally positive Wall Street sentiment, where analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus and an average price target of $562.13. Despite some recent insider selling by executives, institutional ownership remains strong at 85.47%.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Takes Position in PepsiCo, Inc. $PEP
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC recently acquired 25,781 shares of PepsiCo (PEP) in the third quarter, valued at approximately $3.62 million. PepsiCo has announced strategic partnerships with Siemens and NVIDIA to implement AI-powered digital twins and advanced analytics, aiming to reduce operating costs and enhance supply-chain efficiency. However, the company faces increased legal risks due to price-fixing litigation following recently unsealed FTC data.

feed.title: NextEra Energy, Inc. $NEE Shares Purchased by Tema Etfs LLC
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC significantly increased its stake in NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE:NEE) by 98.2% in the third quarter, making it their 19th largest position. Other institutional investors also adjusted their holdings in the utilities provider. NextEra Energy reported strong financial performance, beating earnings estimates and announcing a quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Purchases 15,757 Shares of Medtronic PLC $MDT
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC significantly increased its stake in Medtronic PLC (NYSE:MDT) by 76.6% in the third quarter, acquiring an additional 15,757 shares, bringing its total holdings to 36,325 shares valued at approximately $3.46 million. This increase in institutional ownership comes as Medtronic reported strong Q3 earnings, beating analyst estimates, providing positive FY2026 guidance, and declaring a $0.71 quarterly dividend. The company maintains an average "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts with an average price target of $110.28.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Grows Stock Holdings in Moody's Corporation $MCO
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC increased its stake in Moody's Corporation by 75.1% in Q3, now holding 6,771 shares valued at $3.226 million. Moody's reported stronger-than-expected Q3 earnings with EPS of $3.92 and revenue of $2.01 billion, and has provided optimistic FY2025 EPS guidance. While institutional investors like Fiera Capital Corp, Nordea Investment Management AB, and AXA S.A. have also increased their positions, CEO Robert Fauber recently sold a portion of his shares.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Acquires 11,081 Shares of Intercontinental Exchange Inc. $ICE
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC significantly increased its stake in Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) by 95% in Q3, now holding 22,744 shares valued at $3.832 million. Despite insider selling activity, analysts maintain a "Buy" rating with an average price target of $191.80. The company recently surpassed revenue estimates, reporting strong Q3 earnings per share.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Raises Holdings in Honeywell International Inc. $HON
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC significantly increased its stake in Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) by 105% in the third quarter of 2025, holding 20,294 shares valued at $4.27 million. Institutional investors collectively own 75.91% of the stock. Analyst sentiment remains mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $234.15, despite recent divergent target price adjustments from various firms.

feed.title: Global Payments completes Worldpay acquisition, divests Issuer Solutions By Investing.com
feed.summary: Global Payments Inc. has completed its acquisition of Worldpay from FIS and GTCR, while simultaneously divesting its Issuer Solutions business to FIS. This strategic move transforms Global Payments into a pure-play commerce solutions provider, significantly expanding its capabilities and geographic reach. The combined entity boasts a substantial market presence with annual revenues exceeding $10 billion and processes approximately $3.7 trillion in payment volume annually.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Buys 11,035 Shares of Danaher Corporation $DHR
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC significantly increased its stake in Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) by 211.4% in the third quarter, acquiring 11,035 additional shares, bringing their total to 16,256 shares valued at $3.223 million. Danaher recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates with an EPS of $1.89 and revenue of $6.05 billion. Despite some insider selling, institutional ownership remains high, and analysts have a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $249.92.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Has $3.30 Million Stock Holdings in Deere & Company $DE
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC significantly increased its stake in Deere & Company, now holding 7,214 shares valued at $3.30 million. This comes despite a notable insider stock sale by CEO John C. May II, who reduced his ownership by 26% for about $20.8 million. The company has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with a target price of $524.20, and recently declared a quarterly dividend of $1.62 per share.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Buys New Stake in Citigroup Inc. $C
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC has acquired a new stake in Citigroup Inc., purchasing 32,895 shares valued at approximately $3.34 million in Q3, contributing to the already high institutional ownership of 71.72%. Citigroup recently exceeded earnings and revenue estimates, reporting $2.24 EPS against an expected $1.89 and $22.09 billion in revenue, up 9.3% year-over-year. Analysts maintain a largely positive outlook, with a consensus target price of $118.94 for the stock, which is currently trading near its 12-month high.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Purchases 25,997 Shares of Bristol Myers Squibb Company $BMY
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC increased its stake in Bristol Myers Squibb Company by 34.1% by purchasing an additional 25,997 shares, bringing their total holdings to 102,238 shares valued at $4.61 million. This comes as Bristol Myers Squibb reported strong Q3 earnings, beating estimates with $1.63 EPS and $12.22 billion in revenue, and subsequently raised its quarterly dividend to $0.63. The company maintains significant institutional ownership and has received varied analyst ratings, with an average "Hold" recommendation.

feed.title: Tema Etfs LLC Has $4.40 Million Stock Position in Xcel Energy Inc. $XEL
feed.summary: Tema Etfs LLC significantly increased its stake in Xcel Energy Inc. during Q3, buying an additional 16,681 shares to bring its total holdings to 54,494 shares, valued at approximately $4.40 million. Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.57 per share, yielding about 3.1%, and maintains a "Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $87.21 despite missing Q3 EPS estimates. The company's stock trades at $74.26, with institutional investors owning 78.38% of the shares.

feed.title: US Solar-coaster; Copper in the Age of AI; and 2026 Private Credit Outlook
feed.summary: This S&P Global update covers the "solar-coaster" effect on the US residential solar sector due to accelerated tax credit changes and projects a significant increase in copper demand by 2040, driven by electrification and AI, with potential supply shortfalls. It also analyzes the challenging 2026 outlook for private credit, noting emerging cracks in corporate credit and a shift towards broader geographical and sub-strategy allocations.

feed.title: Moderna raises 2025 revenue forecast to $1.9 billion
feed.summary: Moderna has increased its 2025 revenue forecast to $1.9 billion, exceeding previous guidance, and expects to reduce GAAP operating expenses to target cash breakeven by 2028. The company also anticipates potential first approvals for its seasonal flu and flu/COVID combination vaccines in 2026, alongside multiple clinical data readouts in its oncology, rare disease, and infectious disease portfolios. Its new COVID vaccine, mNEXSPIKE, is also expected to gain further international approvals in 2026.

feed.title: FIS Launches Industry-First Offering Enabling Banks to Lead and Scale in Agentic Commerce
feed.summary: FIS (NYSE: FIS) has introduced a new offering designed to enable banks to participate in agentic commerce, where AI agents act on behalf of consumers to conduct transactions. This initiative, developed in partnership with Mastercard and Visa, aims to keep issuing banks central to the evolving AI-mediated commerce landscape, providing security and fraud protection for AI-initiated purchases. The offering is expected to be available by the end of Q1 2026 and forecasts suggest agentic commerce could generate trillions in global retail revenue by 2030.

feed.title: Henry Schein Names Frederick M. Lowery as Chief Executive Officer
feed.summary: Henry Schein, Inc. has appointed Frederick M. Lowery as its new Chief Executive Officer, effective March 2, 2026. Lowery succeeds Stanley M. Bergman, who will transition to Chairman of the Board after 35 years as CEO. Lowery brings over two decades of healthcare expertise, with a strong background in scaling complex businesses and driving growth, most recently as Executive Vice President and President at Thermo Fisher Scientific.

feed.title: Goldman Sees Higher 10-Year Yields, Even If The Fed Cuts
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs anticipates that long-term US borrowing costs will rise, pushing the 10-year Treasury yield to 4.4% by the end of 2026, even if the Federal Reserve cuts rates. This forecast is based on the US economy's above-trend growth, which tends to steepen the yield curve as investors demand more compensation for long-dated bonds due to inflation, deficits, and policy uncertainty. Such a rise in yields could tighten financial conditions by increasing mortgage and corporate borrowing costs, and make high stock valuations harder to justify.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy's (NASDAQ:FANG) investors will be pleased with their stellar 207% return over the last five years
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy (FANG) has provided investors with an impressive 207% return over the last five years, largely due to its significant dividend payments. The company transitioned from a loss to profitability during this period, which justified the strong share price gain. Although the stock experienced a 15% loss in the past year, longer-term investors have seen annual returns of 25%.

feed.title: Vince Holding Corp. Provides Holiday Sales Results
feed.summary: Vince Holding Corp. has announced its holiday sales results for the nine-week period ending January 3, 2026. The company saw a 5.3% increase in total net sales, driven by a 9.7% rise in its direct-to-consumer segment, while wholesale sales decreased by 2.7%. These preliminary, unaudited results are in line with prior guidance and the company will present further details at the 28th Annual ICR Conference.

feed.title: BofA Securities downgrades American Electric Power stock on valuation By Investing.com
feed.summary: BofA Securities downgraded American Electric Power (AEP) from Buy to Neutral and lowered its price target to $122 due to valuation concerns, despite the company's strong growth prospects and recent operational improvements. The downgrade follows a significant 26% rise in AEP's stock in 2025, leading to a 4% premium over the utilities sector. Despite this, other firms like Jefferies have upgraded AEP, citing a positive growth outlook.

feed.title: Global Payments Completes Acquisition of Worldpay and Divestiture of Issuer Solutions Business, Creating Leading Pure-Play Commerce Solutions Provider
feed.summary: Global Payments Inc. has finalized its acquisition of Worldpay from FIS and GTCR, and simultaneously divested its Issuer Solutions business to FIS. This strategic move transforms Global Payments into a pure-play commerce solutions provider, significantly enhancing its global scale, client offerings, and investment in innovation. The combined entity aims to become the worldwide partner of choice for commerce solutions, serving over 6 million merchant locations across more than 175 countries.

feed.title: GTCR Completes Sale of Worldpay to Global Payments
feed.summary: GTCR has announced the completion of its sale of Worldpay to Global Payments as part of a significant three-way transaction. This deal, valued at $24.25 billion in cash and stock, also involved FIS acquiring Global Payments' Issuer Solutions business. GTCR will retain approximately 15% equity in Global Payments, highlighting its continued belief in the combined entity's growth potential after successfully transforming Worldpay with CEO Charles Drucker.

feed.title: The company now helping run 40B card payments a year just changed hands
feed.summary: FIS (NYSE: FIS) has completed its strategic acquisition of Global Payments' Issuer Solutions business, formerly TSYS, for an enterprise value of $13.5 billion. This acquisition, which includes the world's largest issuing business known for processing over 40 billion transactions annually, strengthens FIS' position as a fintech leader and expands its offerings in credit processing and related services. Concurrently, FIS sold its remaining 45% minority stake in Worldpay to Global Payments, completing its monetization of the ownership.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Announces Positive Topline Results from Phase 3 SCOUT-HCM Trial Evaluating Camzyos (mavacamten) in Adolescents with Symptomatic Obstructive Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy (oHCM)
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb announced positive topline results from its Phase 3 SCOUT-HCM trial, showing Camzyos (mavacamten) significantly reduced the Valsalva left ventricular outflow tract gradient in adolescents (12 to <18 years) with symptomatic obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (oHCM). The study met its primary and multiple secondary endpoints, with a safety profile consistent with that observed in adults. These results highlight Camzyos's potential as the first cardiac myosin inhibitor for adolescent oHCM, offering a new treatment option for a disease currently managed by limited medical and invasive surgical methods.

feed.title: NXP’s New UCODE X Delivers Industry-Leading RAIN RFID Performance for High-Volume Applications
feed.summary: NXP Semiconductors has launched UCODE X, a new RAIN RFID chip offering industry-leading read and write sensitivity and low power consumption. This innovation supports smaller RAIN RFID labels, enabling high-volume applications in retail, logistics, and healthcare, and helps businesses meet evolving global traceability regulations like the EU Digital Product Passport. The UCODE X's flexible configurations and robust performance aim to accelerate RAIN RFID adoption and improve operational efficiency.

feed.title: Travel + Leisure Co. $TNL is Iridian Asset Management LLC CT's 3rd Largest Position
feed.summary: Iridian Asset Management LLC CT reduced its stake in Travel + Leisure Co. (NYSE:TNL) by 30.4% in the third quarter, yet the company remains its third-largest holding, representing 7.2% of its portfolio. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions, while insiders sold a significant number of shares. Analysts currently rate Travel + Leisure as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $72.22.

feed.title: New York State Teachers Retirement System Has $35.49 Million Stock Position in American International Group, Inc. $AIG
feed.summary: New York State Teachers Retirement System reduced its stake in American International Group (AIG) by 12.1% in the third quarter, now owning 451,920 shares valued at $35.49 million. Other institutional investors also adjusted their positions in AIG, which currently has a "Hold" rating from analysts with a consensus price target of $89.17. The company announced a quarterly dividend of $0.45, yielding 2.4% annually, and reported strong Q3 earnings per share of $2.20, significantly exceeding estimates.

feed.title: Iridian Asset Management LLC CT Cuts Holdings in Gen Digital Inc. $GEN
feed.summary: Iridian Asset Management LLC CT reduced its stake in Gen Digital Inc. by 16.2% in Q3, selling 37,554 shares and ending the quarter with 193,957 shares valued at $5.51 million. Despite this, Gen Digital slightly surpassed Q3 earnings expectations with $0.62 EPS on $1.22 billion revenue and provided FY2026 guidance of $2.51-$2.56 EPS. Insider activity included Director John C. Chrystal buying 5,000 shares, while Director Ondrej Vlcek sold 113,674 shares.
